sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91842" key="purrixistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυρριχ-ιστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n91842.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυρριχιστής</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
